name: regulations_gov
description: Regulations.gov MCP server (1102tools/federal-contracting-mcps). 8 read-only tools over the federal Regulations.gov API: rulemaking docket search + detail, document search + detail, public-comment search + detail, open comment-period tracking, and FAR case history lookup. Powers regulatory-change monitoring (FAR/DFARS amendments in flight), comment-period awareness for proposal posture, and historical FAR case research. Requires API_DATA_GOV_KEY (free at api.data.gov; rate-limited per key, shared across api.data.gov-fronted services).
